message:
fix(mail): search rig-level beads when resolving agent addresses

queryAgents only searched town-level beads, so rig-level agents like
witness could not be found for notification. Now searches both town and
rig beads via routes.jsonl, matching the pattern already used by
validateRecipient.

Cherry-picked core fix from PR #1089 by baldvin-kovacs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
